name: Protection from Evil and Good
description: Until the spell ends, one willing creature you touch is protected against certain types of creatures: aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead. The protection grants several benefits: the target can't be charmed, frightened, or possessed by such creatures; attack rolls against the target from such creatures have disadvantage; and the target has advantage on saves against them.
effect: Touch target is protected from aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead: immune to their charm/fear/possession; they attack at disadvantage; target saves at advantage against them
notes: Touch range — must be adjacent; protects one creature
Salt circle drawn as part of casting — ward against extraplanar creatures
